offer: For real estate appraisers processing 5–15 reports/month, inconsistent report generation causes delayed client responses. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets and templates.
problem: Inconsistent and time-consuming property valuation report generation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for real estate appraisers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to real estate appraisers with demo video
Community forums for real estate appraisal tools
try_it: Let users try template library for property reports and customizable fields on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
